task.objective: Add "Add Tag" and "Bookmark" actions to the article UI with role-based permissions.

roles.role: Can add and manage tags on articles.
Can add and manage tags on their own articles.

ui.requirement: Add "Add Tag" button on article page.
Buttons must be visually consistent with existing UI and properly aligned.

add_tag.requirement: Only visible to EDITOR and AUTHOR.
Allows adding/removing tags for an article.
Must reflect updated tags immediately in UI after changes.

bookmark.requirement: Available to all roles including VIEWER.
Bookmark state must be persisted per user.
UI must reflect current bookmark state (e.g. active/inactive).

permissions.rule: Add Tag: allowed for AUTHOR (own articles) and EDITOR
Bookmark: allowed for all authenticated users (including VIEWER)

validation.check: Role-based visibility of buttons works correctly
Unauthorized users cannot access Add Tag actions
Bookmark toggling works and persists correctly
UI updates correctly after actions without refresh
No layout or styling issues introduced

output.instruction: Implement UI changes and necessary logic
Ensure proper backend/API integration if required
Briefly summarize what was added and how permissions are enforced
